headline: ULTA Q4 Deep Dive: Margin Contraction and Strategic Investments Temper Positive Sales Growth
summary: Beauty, cosmetics, and personal care retailer Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 11.8% year on year to $3.90 billion. Its GAAP profit of $8.01 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Adobe, Tesla, Ulta Beauty, SentinelOne, and More
summary: Stock futures were moving slightly to the upside Friday as oil prices rose and Wall Street awaited the release of personal consumption expenditures price index data for February.  Tesla  rose 0.6% in premarket trading.  Better-than-expected fiscal first-quarter earnings were overshadowed by the resignation of the software company’s long-time CEO, Shantanu Narayen.

headline: S&P 500 Stock Ulta Beauty's Earnings Are Ugly But This Is Why Analysts Remain Positive
summary: S&P 500 stock Ulta Beauty's earnings for the fiscal fourth-quarter missed analyst estimates with fiscal 2026 profit guidance also coming in slightly below the consensus view.  Ulta Beauty shares sank in Friday's stock market but analysts appear to remain positive on the S&P 500 component.  Ulta Beauty late Thursday announced fiscal Q4 EPS fell 5.3% to $8.01 as revenue increased 11.5% to $3.89 billion.
